title: Livepeer AI Companion File
description: Schema for static companion files that make client-side JSX component data accessible to AI agents and crawlers. Two variants: snapshot (live API data cached at build time) and props-extracted (data props lifted from MDX into a sidecar JSON).

snapshotCompanion.title: Snapshot Companion
snapshotCompanion.description: Caches live API responses at build time. Used by components with @aiDiscoverability=snapshot (e.g. CoinGeckoExchanges). Contains a _meta block and one typed data array.

type.description: Discriminator: identifies this as a snapshot companion.

sourceComponent.description: Name of the JSX component that consumes this file (e.g. CoinGeckoExchanges).

sourceUrl.description: The external API URL that was snapshotted.

coinId.description: CoinGecko coin ID when sourceComponent is CoinGeckoExchanges (e.g. livepeer, arbitrum).

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this snapshot was generated.

exchanges.description: CoinGeckoExchanges data array. Each entry is one exchange listing.

propsExtractedCompanion.title: Props-Extracted Companion
propsExtractedCompanion.description: Lifts data props out of MDX component invocations into a sidecar JSON. Used by components with @aiDiscoverability=props-extracted (e.g. SearchTable, ShowcaseCards). The top-level key is named after the data shape (e.g. terms, cards).

glossaryCompanion.title: Glossary Props-Extracted Companion
glossaryCompanion.description: Data sidecar for SearchTable used on glossary/compendium pages. Produced by generate-glossary-companions.js.

terms.description: All glossary entries for this section.

tabs.description: Section tab identifiers this term appears in (used in consolidated glossary).

showcaseCardsCompanion.title: ShowcaseCards Props-Extracted Companion
showcaseCardsCompanion.description: Data sidecar for ShowcaseCards used on showcase / solutions pages. Key is 'items' matching the component prop name.
